companies.title: Companies to Monitor
companies.description: List of company names or queries to search for across all sources.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages to visit per run (applies to Reddit scraper).

newsApiKey.title: News API Key (Optional)
newsApiKey.description: Get free API key at newsapi.org (required if news source enabled). 100 requests/day on free tier.

knownCompetitors.title: Known Competitors (Optional)
knownCompetitors.description: List of competitor names to track in discussions.
